meta.title: 2YH — Health in Your Hands
meta.description: Upload exams in any language. Our medical-grade AI reads, translates, and organizes them into one clean record in your pocket.

hero.lede: Upload a blood panel from Lisbon, an MRI report from São Paulo, a prescription from Paris. Our medical-grade AI reads them, translates them, and organizes them into one clean, standardized record in your pocket.

ingest.body: Snap a photo, forward an email, drop a PDF. Our medical-grade AI reads the document, identifies every biomarker, converts units, translates terminology, and stores it in an open, standardized schema — the same way, every time.
ingest.example: "Colesterol LDL · 118 mg/dL" from a Brazilian lab and "LDL-C · 3.05 mmol/L" from a French one become the same data point on the same chart.

how.title: Three steps. That's the whole thing.
how.step1_body: Upload a PDF, photograph a paper report, or forward the lab's email. We accept everything — paper, fax printouts, DICOM, handwritten notes.
how.step2_body: Our AI interprets the document in its original language, extracts every biomarker, and maps it to the international LOINC / SNOMED standard. Units are normalized automatically.
how.step3_body: Everything lands in one clean timeline with trends, plain-language explanations, and proactive flags when values drift — years of records, readable in a glance.

insights.body: Once your records are standardized, patterns emerge. Trends become visible. Our insights engine watches for drift, connects dots across years of data, and writes it up in language you actually use.
insights.card_flag_p: Values trending toward a limit — even while still "normal" — get flagged months earlier.
insights.card_plain_p: Every result comes with a short explanation. No jargon. No late-night WebMD.
insights.card_correlate_p: See which markers moved with your new medication, routine, or job stress.
insights.card_family_p: Kids' vaccinations, parents' cardiology reports — one roof, private to each person.

security.body: Medical records are the most personal data you own. We treat them that way — encrypted on your device, encrypted in transit, encrypted at rest. You own every byte.

pricing.title: Start free. Stay honest.
pricing.subtitle: No surprise tiers, no usage cliffs. Pick what fits; upgrade when your records do.

final_cta.kicker: Your health, finally in one place.

footer.copyright: © 2026 2YH — Health in Your Hands. Organized, understood, yours.
